Rules.InvariantScript:
"🚨 " & ThisItem.EmergencyType.Value &
Char(10) &
"📍 " & ThisItem.'Location: PlaceName' & ", " & ThisItem.'Location: Street' & ", " & ThisItem.'Location: City' & " " & ThisItem.'Location: Postcode' &
Char(10) &
"📍 Lat: " & ThisItem.Latitude &
", Lng: " & ThisItem.Longitude&
Char(10) &
"📝 " & ThisItem.'Description (Optional)' &
Char(10) &
"👤 " & ThisItem.ReporterName &
Char(10) &
"🕒 " & Text(ThisItem.CreatedTime, "dd/mm/yyyy")

ControlPropertyState.AutoRuleBindingString:
"🚨 " & ThisItem.EmergencyType.Value &
Char(10) &
"📍 " & ThisItem.'Location: PlaceName' & ", " & ThisItem.'Location: Street' & ", " & ThisItem.'Location: City' & " " & ThisItem.'Location: Postcode' &
Char(10) &
"📝 " & ThisItem.'Description (Optional)' &
Char(10) &
"👤 " & ThisItem.ReporterName &
Char(10) &
"🕒 " & Text(ThisItem.CreatedTime, "dd/mm/yyyy")

Rules.InvariantScript:
"👤 "& ThisItem.Name & Char(10) &
"🏠 Residence: " & ThisItem.'Location: Street' & ", " & ThisItem.'Location: City' & " " & ThisItem.'Location: Postcode' & Char(10) &
"🩺 " & ThisItem.Specialty.Value &
Char(10) &
If(
    !IsBlank(selectedReport.Latitude) &&
    !IsBlank(selectedReport.Longitude) &&
    !IsBlank(ThisItem.Latitude) &&
    !IsBlank(ThisItem.Longitude),

    "📏 Current distance to Report: " &
    Text(
        6371 * 2 * Asin(
            Sqrt(
                Power(
                    Sin(
                        Radians(ThisItem.Latitude - selectedReport.Latitude) / 2
                    ),
                    2
                ) +
                Cos(Radians(selectedReport.Latitude)) *
                Cos(Radians(ThisItem.Latitude)) *
                Power(
                    Sin(
                        Radians(ThisItem.Longitude - selectedReport.Longitude) / 2
                    ),
                    2
                )
            )
        ),
        "0.00"
    ) & " km",

    "📏 Current distance to Report: unavailable"
)

ControlPropertyState.AutoRuleBindingString:
"👤 "& ThisItem.Name & Char(10) &
"📍 " & ThisItem.'Residential Street' & ", " & ThisItem.'Residential City' & " " & ThisItem.'Residential Postcode' & Char(10) &
"🩺 " & ThisItem.Specialty.Value
